exercises.title: Professional Greetings
exercises.instruction: Listen and repeat. Emphasize the bold syllables clearly and keep unstressed syllables short.
tips: Keep 'to' and 'you' unstressed - say them quickly

exercises.title: Meeting Expressions
exercises.instruction: Practice of stress pattern. Important words are stressed.

exercises.title: Thought Groups
exercises.instruction: Break this sentence into natural thought groups. Pause at the slashes.
exercises.targetText: I'll review the document, and then I'll share my feedback.
chunks: and then I'll share my feedback.
tips: Each chunk should feel like a complete thought

exercises.title: Questions vs Statements
exercises.instruction: Listen to how your voice goes up at the end for questions.
tips: Your voice should rise at the end: ↗
Statements end with a falling tone: ↘
